seoTitle: Direk vs Dismal Swamp — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Direk and Dismal Swamp. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Direk vs Dismal Swamp: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Direk and Dismal Swamp.
heading: Direk vs Dismal Swamp — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Direk, South Australia and Dismal Swamp, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dismal Swamp has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Direk (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Direk or Dismal Swamp safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Direk has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Dismal Swamp scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Direk scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Dismal Swamp scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Direk or Dismal Swamp?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dismal Swamp has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
